Petition To Waive Probate Referee
Off Calendar Dec-24-2018 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Mark Corrinet for petitioner Alexander Berenson, who appeared by CourtCall.

Mr. Corrinet stated that he had provided the accounting to Mr. Bornstein, and that the estate contained only one property and five joint accounts. The Court ruled that good cause had not been shown for the waiving of a probate referee, and the petition was denied.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy Anasse. (Not reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar Dec-18-2018 Continued To Jan-08-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Waive Probate Referee
Off Calendar Dec-10-2018 Continued To Dec-24-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar Aug-28-2018 Continued To Sep-25-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Mark Corrinet appeared by telephone for Petitioner.

Mr. Corrinet stated that it took several weeks to get a hold of Mr. Bornstein, that he wanted to request a waiver of a Probate Referee, that he spoke with Mr. Bornstein and that Mr. Bornstein is requesting filing of a formal petition. Mr. Corrinet also stated that he drafted a petition, that he will file it on Thursday along with a request for appointment of another Referee, that there are cash accounts, a stock and two properties, and that there is only one heir. Status on filing of an inventory and appraisal is continued to September 25, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar Feb-26-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Mark Corrinet for The Estate of Julie Bereson via Court Call.

The Court asked counsel to address the issue of the codicil. Mr. Corrinet stated that the codicil is moot, that the estate has worked out an arrangement regarding the special gift, that they need Letters Testamentary to move forward and close the estate and that there are no other relatives. The Court asked about the resolution on the issue of the codicil. Mr. Corrinet stated that the Padre learned of the intent and made no objections, that he is in the process of producing a notarized statement waiving interest and that it will be provided with the final accounting. The Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary subject to review of the order.

Judge: Paul H. Alvarado. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Jung. (Not Reported)

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Dec-14-2015 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court stated that there is no appearance and took the petition for probate of will and letters testamentary off calendar.

Judge: Paul H. Alvarado. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Henry. (Not Reported)

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Nov-09-2015 Continued To Dec-14-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Sep-28-2015 Continued To Oct-19-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Aug-24-2015 Continued To Sep-28-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Alexander Bereson in Propria Persona.

The Court asked Mr. Bereson to walk through the next steps in this procedure. Mr. Bereson reported that he has spoken to the attorney who prepared the will and codicil and that a declaration will be filed, walked the court through his idea of the next steps and asked a question regarding the appraisal. The Court stated that it does not see this as a straightforward case, that it has concerns with Mr. Bereson's understanding of the next steps and the gaps in what is needed and that it will continue the matter to allow time to obtain counsel. The petition for probate of will and for letters testamentary was continued to September 28, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares. (Not Reported)
